title: Dependency combo change
excerpt:
Hi, 
How do you change which column the dependency column is linked to from timeline to due date. 
I can’t see this anywhere!! 
Thanks

posts.author: AndyTaylor (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
How do you change which column the dependency column is linked to from timeline to due date.
I can’t see this anywhere!!
Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Andy,

If you click into the dependency column settings:

Screen Shot 2024-04-17 at 11.40.02 am1136×832 68.6 KB

You should be able to adjust which column the dependency column is linked to!

Let me know if you have any issues

posts.author: AndyTaylor (Andy)
posts.cookedHtml: Perfect thanks, I am not a board owner so did not have access.
